nodes.name: Village Gate
nodes.description: A drawbridge, moat, and heavy gatehouse guarded by Lars and Sven.

nodes.name: Market Square
nodes.description: The social center of the village, where rumor, trade, and panic spread fast.

nodes.name: Brunn Manor
nodes.description: The late mayor's haunted house, still avoided by most villagers.

nodes.name: Bountiful Heron
nodes.description: Otto and Magda Botler's general store, warm on the surface and dangerous below it.

nodes.name: Saint Traft Memorial
nodes.description: A memorial inside the chapel where visions and blessings may still linger.

nodes.name: Visgaud Grounds
nodes.description: Administrative and militia grounds where the council meets in crises.
